info.title: CKAN Action API
info.description: CKAN is an open-source data management system. The Action API is a powerful RPC-style API that exposes all of CKAN's core features. All endpoints accept JSON POST requests to /api/3/action/{action_name}. The response is always a JSON dictionary with 'success', 'result', and 'help' keys.

post.description: CKAN Action API: package_list. List all dataset names.
